julius randle.detail: Played 36 minutes, recorded 17 points, 10 rebounds, and 1 assist in a blowout loss
julius randle.web_narrative: Randle missed the assists over 2 prop with just 1 assist across 36 minutes. Minnesota trailed badly in a 29-point blowout loss, limiting late-game playmaking opportunities, and Randle's role focused on scoring and rebounding rather than facilitating.

rudy gobert.detail: Played 23 minutes, recorded only 5 rebounds in a blowout loss
rudy gobert.web_narrative: Gobert missed the rebounds over 8 prop with just 5 rebounds in 23 minutes. The blowout loss limited his floor time, and a noted left rib sprain (though listed as played through) may have affected his ability to contest and secure boards at his usual rate.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 33 minutes, posted 27 points, 17 rebounds, 5 assists, and 3 blocks in a blowout win
